Testimonials.heading: Results That Speak for Themselves
Testimonials.item0Quote: Nereid Systems transformed our network infrastructure. What used to take weeks of downtime now runs smoothly 24/7. Their expertise in modern IT solutions is unmatched.
Testimonials.item1Quote: The AI automation workflow they built saved us 30 hours per week. We went from reactive to proactive, and our team can finally focus on strategic growth.
Testimonials.item2Quote: Their full-stack development approach delivered exactly what we needed: a scalable platform that grows with our business. Professional, reliable, and innovative.

PortfolioPreview.heading: Projects That Drive Results
PortfolioPreview.project0Result: Reduced onboarding time from 2 weeks to 4 hours with automated provisioning
PortfolioPreview.project1Result: Automated 68% of manual dispatch decisions, saving 30+ hours per week
PortfolioPreview.project2Result: Zero unplanned downtime in 18 months post-deployment with proactive monitoring

Upcoming.heading: Products We're Building

medrating.title: MedRating Panama
medrating.desc: A comprehensive medical rating and review platform for healthcare providers in Panama. Features AI-powered sentiment analysis, patient feedback aggregation, and provider performance metrics.

football.title: Football Analyzer & Scout
football.desc: AI-driven football talent scouting platform that analyzes player performance data, provides predictive analytics, and helps scouts identify emerging talent.

stoic.title: Stoic Guard
stoic.desc: Stoic Guard is a digital wellbeing app that helps you live more intentionally by reframing your relationship with distracting technology. Built on Stoic principles, it treats attention as a sacred resource and uses psychological nudges and philosophical reflection to build lasting discipline.
stoic.f1: Gentle attention coaching instead of blocking
stoic.f2: Custom routines grounded in Stoic practice
stoic.f4: Insightful usage analytics with reflective summaries

Services.metaDesc: Network infrastructure, web & mobile apps, AI automation, and IT management for growing companies. Transparent scope, timelines, and pricing.
Services.heroSubheading: From infrastructure to the application layer—we cover the full stack.

network.title: Network Installation & Configuration
network.outcome: Reliable, secure infrastructure so your team stays connected—not stuck troubleshooting.
network.scope: Full network design, hardware procurement, switch/router configuration, VLAN segmentation, firewall setup, Wi-Fi deployment, and ongoing monitoring.
network.timeline: 1–4 weeks depending on office size and complexity

web.title: Web Application Development
web.outcome: Fast, accessible web apps that convert visitors into customers and scale with demand.
web.scope: Full-stack web application design and development: architecture, frontend, backend APIs, database design, authentication, deployment, and post-launch support.
web.stack: Next.js, React, Node.js, Python/FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Redis, AWS/Vercel

mobile.title: Mobile App Development
mobile.outcome: iOS & Android apps that feel native, load instantly, and keep users coming back.
mobile.scope: Cross-platform mobile app design and development, App Store / Play Store submission, push notifications, offline support, and iterative post-launch updates.
mobile.stack: React Native, Expo, TypeScript, Firebase, Supabase

integration.title: Systems Integration
integration.outcome: Legacy and modern systems working in harmony—no more data silos or manual workarounds.
integration.scope: API design and development, ETL pipelines, ERP/CRM integrations, webhook infrastructure, legacy system adapters, and real-time data sync.
integration.timeline: 2–10 weeks depending on system count and complexity
integration.stack: REST/GraphQL APIs, Zapier, n8n, custom Python/Node.js connectors

ai.title: AI Automation Workflows
ai.outcome: Automate repetitive work with AI so your team focuses on what actually moves the needle.
ai.scope: Process identification, AI pipeline design, LLM API integration, structured data extraction, agent tooling, and workflow monitoring.
ai.stack: OpenAI, Anthropic Claude, LangChain, Python, n8n, AWS Lambda

it.title: IT Management for SMBs
it.outcome: Proactive IT support and monitoring so you never lose a workday to unexpected outages.
it.scope: 24/7 monitoring, patch management, backup and recovery, helpdesk support, vendor management, and annual IT planning.
it.stack: Microsoft 365, Google Workspace, monitoring tools, ticketing systems
